content.text: Global 1st Place, SC25 Indy Student Cluster Competition (IndySCC). Implemented full-stack optimization over distributed simulation workloads.

content.text: Second Prize, 12th National Parallel Application Challenge (PAC). Achieved 300% performance gain on matrix floating-point workloads.
1st Place, 9th Huawei ICT China Challenge Finals. Optimized model partitioning and operator fusion on Mind-Speed, delivering 1.15x end-to-end training acceleration.
